abilities.name: Eat Lightning
abilities.description: When suffers damage, gains Adrenaline +1 until end of Dramatic Time (heals 1 damage at round end, lower by 1).

abilities.name: Hand-Picked Men
abilities.description: Gains + to attack and damage flips within 6 yards of friendly Enforcer/Henchman/Master.

actions: (1) Brass Knuckles (Pugilism) | AV: 5 (10) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage. Weapon gains + to damage flip. Ram Broken Nose: After damaging, target Dazed until healed. Crow Aim Low: After damaging, target Slow.

(1) You Lookin At Me? (Intimidate) | AV: 5 (10) | Rg: 8 | Resist: Wp | If target can be Charged, immediately declares Charge vs this character even if engaged. Successful attacks suffer -- to damage flip. If successful Charge, becomes Paralyzed.
system.notes: Strong unsubtle enforcement arm of Union. Former convicts and rough laborers. Enforce Union will through intimidation and violence. Rewarded with good pay and legal protection.
